profiles.name: Charge
profiles.abilities: AT(2), Quick(+2), Can only be used with a Charge order.

equipment.name: Banner of the Eagle횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gain +1 Strength. Ancients only. Unique.

equipment.name: Cyber-Eagle Helm횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit does not suffer the To Hit penalty for Defensive Fire.

equipment.name: Hunter's Eye횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: All ranged attacks by this model and its attached unit have the Seeking ability. Unique

equipment.name: Mantle of the Stormseer횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: This model gains +1 to manifest and deny psychic powers. Unique.

equipment.name: Plume of the Plainsrunner
equipment.desc: This model and its attached unit gain the cumulative Frenzy(1") and Haste(1") abilities. Unique.

equipment.name: Stormwrath Bolts횄징횂쨈횂쨀
equipment.desc: When firing a bolt weapon, this model may choose to fire a Stormwrath bolt instead of attacking normally. Use their bolt weapon's range and the profile above.

equipment.name: Wrath of the Heavens
equipment.desc: This model gains the "Jetbike" type. Bike only. Unique
